info.name: HubSpot Commerce Subscriptions API
info.description:
The subscriptions API allows you to retrieve data about recurring subscription records in HubSpot Commerce. Subscriptions are created when a customer purchases a recurring product through HubSpot payments or a connected payment processor. Subscription records follow the standard CRM object pattern at /crm/v3/objects/subscriptions.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support

request.description: Returns all associations of a subscription record to objects of a specified type, such as contacts, companies, or deals.

response.name: List of associations returned successfully.
